title: Why This Rural Health System Is Scaling AI for Point-of-Care Decision Making
description: Presbyterian Healthcare Services has rolled out an AI-powered precision care platform to 200 primary care providers, helping them review charts, identify care gaps and make faster treatment decisions. The tool is also designed to maximize each visit, especially for rural patients who travel long distances to receive care.The post Why This Rural Health System Is Scaling AI for Point-of-Care Decision Making appeared first on MedCity News.

title: AI software plugins likely to weigh on IT roles for next 12-18 months, experts say
description: While estimates across staffing and consultancy firms vary, experts estimate anywhere between 6% and 20% of the headcount in specific IT and business functions to be impacted, as more enterprises adopt artificial intelligence, increasing productivity levels by 30-40%.
